nasb.text: Blessings are on the head of the righteous, But the mouth of the wicked conceals violence.

esv.text: Blessings are on the head of the righteous, but the mouth of the wicked conceals violence.

cnv.text: 福祉臨到義人頭上， 強暴遮蓋惡人的口。

ccb.text: 祝福临到义人的头， 残暴充满恶人的口。

csbs.text: 祝福临到义人的头上， 而恶人的口掩盖残暴。
